untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 10 new price lines and precise angle measurement (>60 degrees). These require custom geometric candle pattern recognition unavailable in standard indicator set. Price position relative to yearly low also requires historical context not in allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using tall candle body (body > ATR) and sharp range movement as indicators of sharp V-move. Actual pattern requires: (1) counting new highs/lows within candle formation, (2) measuring angle of ascent in degrees, (3) tracking position vs yearly low. Exit condition uses reversal logic (close below previous close) per AUTHOR_SILENT guidance. Stop loss and target price left null due to author silence.
